title: Smemorandum
subtitle: Birthday & Event Reminders
shortDescription: Never forget birthdays, anniversaries and deadlines. Smart reminders with custom notification sounds.
fullDescription:
Smemorandum is the reminder that never forgets. Perfect for anyone who wants to remember birthdays, anniversaries, special occasions and important deadlines without stress.

WHAT YOU CAN DO:

• Birthday and anniversary reminders with customizable notifications
• Deadline management for bills, appointments and renewals
• Visual calendar with all your events
• Multiple reminders per event (same day, day before, week before)
• Custom notification sounds for each event
• Automatic recurrence (yearly, monthly, weekly, custom intervals)
• Categories and filters to organize events
• Quick search across all your reminders
• Light and dark theme
• Multilingual support (English, Italian, Spanish, French, German)

WHY SMEMORANDUM:

Forgetful? Don't worry, Smemorandum has your back! The name says it all: from the Latin "memorandum" (something to remember) with a playful twist for those who tend to forget. Set your reminders once and never think about it again.

Never miss an important birthday again. Download Smemorandum now!
